hero.subtitulo: The sacred and festive characters of Riobamba's traditional celebrations

intro.texto: Riobamba's pases are far more than festivals. They are a universe of characters that synthesize centuries of Andean worldview, colonial faith, and mestizo creativity. We document them with the rigor they deserve.

ritual.texto: The Pase del Niño is Riobamba's most important celebration. Each December, the streets fill with characters who dance between the sacred and the festive, carrying centuries of Andean identity in every costume, every mask.

qr.texto: Scan the QR code on your card to discover the full story of the character.

recorrido.finale_texto: Each character played their part along the way. And this is just one of Riobamba's pases.
recorrido.avanza_hint: Tap next to walk the pase

personajes.descripcion: Each character carries centuries of history, symbolism, and cultural transformation.
personajes.sin_resultados: No characters found with that criteria.

pases.descripcion: The pases are the stage where the characters come to life.
pases.intro_oficial: Official routes of the Pases del Niño in Riobamba. Each institution organizes its own parade with characters, music and troupes through the streets of the historic center.
pases.dia_banner: Wednesday December 20 · {count} parades throughout the day
pases.nota: Official routes issued by Riobamba City Hall for December 20. Routes and times may vary in future editions.

error.personaje_desc: The link may have changed or the character is no longer published. Explore all the beings of the pase.

historia.secreto_titulo: Only for those who hold this magnet
historia.secreto_subtitulo: A fact you won't find on the public page
historia.compartir_mensaje:
I discovered the secret of {nombre} 🔑

"{secreto}"

— Only for Nunna magnet holders ✨
historia.cta_qr_titulo: The full story of {nombre} is in the magnet.

anatomia.hint: Scroll to explore each part of the costume.

desbloquear.subtitulo: Enter the 6-character code printed under your card to awaken the character and add it to your collection.
desbloquear.email_ayuda: We save your collection with your email so you can recover it on any device. No passwords: we send you a magic link.
desbloquear.enlace_enviado_texto: We sent a link to {email}. Open it on this device and your being will awaken automatically.
desbloquear.exito_texto: It's now part of your collection.
desbloquear.error_invalido: That code isn't valid. Check the 6 characters under your card.
desbloquear.error_ya_tuyo: You already have this being in your collection.
desbloquear.error_ya_canjeado: This code was already redeemed by another account.
desbloquear.error_email: We couldn't send the link. Check your email and try again.
desbloquear.email_requerido: Enter your email to save your collection.
desbloquear.error_generico: Something went wrong. Please try again.
desbloquear.no_camara: No camera access? Type the code by hand — it's the most accessible way.
desbloquear.ficha_texto: Enter the code under your card to live its full experience.

coleccion.vacio_texto: Unlock your first being with the code on its card.
coleccion.bloqueado_hint: Enter the code on its card

logros.origen_completo_desc: You gathered every being of {origen} origin.
logros.coleccion_completa_desc: You awakened all 9 beings. The collection is complete.
